parameters.query:
INSERT INTO whatsapp_contacts_cache (lid, phone_number, push_name, group_id, owner)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.contactCache.lid }}',
  '{{ $json.contactCache.phoneNumber }}',
  '{{ $json.contactCache.pushName }}',
  '{{ $json.contactCache.groupId }}',
  '{{ $json.contactCache.owner }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (lid, owner) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  phone_number = EXCLUDED.phone_number,
  push_name = EXCLUDED.push_name,
  group_id = EXCLUDED.group_id,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
